{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 1,
    "R1.2": 1,
    "R1.4": 1,
    "R1.6": 1,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output does not address the conceptual reconstruction of the artifact, as it fails to identify and propose a reframing that addresses the internal contradictions.",
    "R1.2": "The output does not engage with the logical consistency of the argument chain, failing to identify and repair inconsistencies.",
    "R1.4": "The output does not assess novelty, instead asserting it without specific contrast or prior work coverage.",
    "R1.6": "The output does not improve writing polish, as it contains redundant language and throat-clearing adverbs.",
    "RX.1": "The output does not disclose uncertainty, presenting all claims with equal confidence despite the presence of internal contradictions.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, failing to address the scope of the task.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors and fabrications through its unconditional progress claim and mutex-based implementation description.",
    "RX.5": "The output does not provide provenance and traceability for non-cosmetic changes, instead blending sources without annotation."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output does not address the conceptual reconstruction of the artifact, as it fails to identify and propose a reframing that addresses the internal contradictions.
rationale.R1.2: The output does not engage with the logical consistency of the argument chain, failing to identify and repair inconsistencies.
rationale.R1.4: The output does not assess novelty, instead asserting it without specific contrast or prior work coverage.
rationale.R1.6: The output does not improve writing polish, as it contains redundant language and throat-clearing adverbs.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not disclose uncertainty, presenting all claims with equal confidence despite the presence of internal contradictions.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, failing to address the scope of the task.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors and fabrications through its unconditional progress claim and mutex-based implementation description.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide provenance and traceability for non-cosmetic changes, instead blending sources without annotation.
